candidates.row_label: Premium revenue ceded to reinsurers on insurance contracts issued
candidates.why: Ceded premium revenue is a contra-revenue/reinsurance line, not the company's gross top-line revenue.
This is the core insurance top-line revenue line and is the best semantic match for revenue for recent years.
This is a broader total revenue measure including investment and other income; useful only as fallback if the primary revenue label changes.

variables.notes: Preferred primary revenue line is Insurance Revenue. Total Revenue is included as a fallback priority label if reporting presentation changes across years.

No COGS candidates were provided. For an insurer, the closest direct cost / cost of services line is 'Insurance Service Expenses', which appears directly against 'Insurance Revenue' in the core underwriting result. Manual review is needed because insurance statements do not present traditional COGS and alternative direct-cost lines like claims/benefits also exist in older presentation years.

candidates.why: A valid SG&A component representing personnel overhead, but only visible in older-year preview.
A valid SG&A component representing personnel overhead.
A generic personnel-cost row, but appears unpopulated in the preview and may be a template line.
Balance sheet line, not an income-statement operating expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is explicitly excluded from SG&A components for this task.

variables.notes: The candidate list appears incomplete for insurer overhead because the clearly relevant operating-overhead row 'Other expenses' is present in the statement but not in the candidate list. Selected it plus personnel-cost rows to capture SG&A/overhead while excluding depreciation/amortization, finance items, and totals such as 'Insurance Expense - Total' or balancing rows. Manual review is needed because overlap between 'Other expenses' and staff-cost rows is possible in this insurance-format statement. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance-cost line and the closest match to interest expense, though broader than pure interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: This is a true interest expense line but too narrow to represent total interest expense for the firm.
Potentially relevant if used in some years, but appears unpopulated in the preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental narrow lease-interest line; inferior to broader finance expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Contains 'Balancing value', so it should not be preferred over a real reported line.
Balancing line, not preferred when a reported finance expense line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Using priority ordering: broad recurring finance expense first, then narrower explicit interest line, then Finance Costs as fallback if labels change.

candidates.why: Income statement impairment line, not book equity.
Income statement gain/loss line, not book equity.
Income statement gain/loss line, not book equity.
A component of equity, not total parent equity.
Only one component of equity, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it captures parent/common equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Would include non-controlling interests; only use if no parent-equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected parent equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Best balance-sheet label for minority/non-controlling interest.
Equivalent balance-sheet label and good fallback if naming changes.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests - Total
candidates.why: Income statement/OCI allocation, not balance-sheet minority equity.
